global_description: Large flightless bird with long neck and legs, bulky body covered in fluffy feathers, predominantly black and white plumage, small head with large eyes and flat beak, powerful legs adapted for running.

part_details.head: Small with large eyes and flat beak
part_details.neck: Long and slender, covered in sparse feathers
part_details.body: Bulky with fluffy black and white feathers
part_details.legs: Long and powerful, adapted for running

spatial_relations: Neck extends from body to head
